query:
Audit this Dockerfile for dependency-pinning issues:

```
FROM python:3.13-slim
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl=7.88.1-10
RUN pip install requests
RUN pip install pandas==2.2.0
RUN npm install -g typescript@5.4.5
RUN npm install express
```
expected_behavior: Identifies at least one specific unpinned install with a line reference or quoted command (e.g., flags `pip install requests` or `npm install express` as unpinned)
Suggests a concrete pinned form for each finding (e.g., `requests==<version>` or `express@<version>`, or recommends `npm ci`/lockfile-based install)
Does NOT flag the already-pinned lines (`pandas==2.2.0`, `typescript@5.4.5`, `curl=7.88.1-10`) as pinning issues
